---
title: " Mystery of the Cavern, The (Published with reprint of Abbeychurch). By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

##  Mystery of the Cavern, The (Published with reprint of Abbeychurch). By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1872
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John and Charles Mozley, Paternoster Row, London. Joseph Masters, New Bond Street, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
